edges.evidence_quote: Between 2015 and 2018, the Familia do Norte and the Comando Vermelho (CV) formed an alliance to prevent the advance of the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) in Amazonas
edges.context: FDN and CV were allied from 2015 to 2018 against PCC.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2018, the alliance dissolved, generating a confrontation between the CV and Familia do Norte
edges.context: After 2018, FDN and CV became enemies, engaging in conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Comando Vermelho (after July 2020), Guardiões do Estado , Primeiro Comando da Capital
edges.context: FDN lists PCC as a rival in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Comando Vermelho (after July 2020), Guardiões do Estado , Primeiro Comando da Capital

edges.evidence_quote: Between 2015 and 2018, the Familia do Norte and the Comando Vermelho (CV) formed an alliance to prevent the advance of the Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC) in Amazonas, generating the War between the PCC and CV in 2016
edges.context: CV and PCC were in conflict, with the war starting in 2016.

edges.evidence_quote: some leaving to join a CV splinter group known as "Revolucionarios do Amazonas" (Revolutionaries of Amazonas; RDA), which later joined PCC in the state.
edges.context: RDA, a CV splinter, later joined PCC.
